prompt: Two review follow-ups on the split-payment feature in this Android POS app (com.handa.pos, split-payment domain logic under app/src/main/java/com/handa/pos/core/domain/model/). (1) Equal split can produce cash portions like RM 3.33 that are physically untenderable in Malaysia — 5-sen minimum coin, exact tender, no change assist. Portions must snap DOWN to 5-sen multiples, with the last portion absorbing the remainder so the portions still sum exactly to the total. (2) When a coupon shifts the order total, regenerating the portions currently wipes the cashier's tender-mode assignments (cash/card per portion) — a regeneration triggered by a total change must keep the existing mode assignments; only changing the number of ways resets them. Extend the existing SplitPaymentTest to cover both behaviours. Commit when the tests pass. Do not release or deploy.
